title: Geranium Dreamland Hardy Outdoor Flowering Garden Perennial Plants in Plant Pot (20-30cm Incl. Pot)
features: Characteristics: Hardy geranium, white / light pink cup-shaped flowers with dark veins, green deciduous foliage, clump forming, snail resistant, perfect for flower beds and borders or ground cover
Growth & spread: Maximum height and spread of 50cm

Care and Maintenance: Your Geranium will thrive in a location benefitting from access to full sun or partial shade. Plant in a moist but well-drained soil composed of Chalk, Clay, Loam or Sand. Water when the top soil is dry. Deadhead faded flowers to encourage new growth.
Period of interest: Flowers in spring to autumn.
